程序包 org.graphstream.stream.file

类 FileSinkGEXF2

java.lang.Object
org.graphstream.stream.SourceBase
org.graphstream.stream.PipeBase
org.graphstream.stream.file.FileSinkGEXF2
所有已实现的接口:
AttributeSink, ElementSink, FileSink, Pipe, Sink, Source
public class FileSinkGEXF2 extends PipeBase implements FileSink

  • 构造器详细资料

    • FileSinkGEXF2

      public FileSinkGEXF2()

  • 方法详细资料

    • writeAll

      public void writeAll(Graph graph, String fileName) throws IOException
      从接口复制的说明: FileSink
      Write the current graph state in one big non-interruptible operation. This operation is a "snapshot" of the graph, it will never convey the dynamics of the graph. To ensure you store the graph "as it evolves in time" you must use the FileSink.begin(OutputStream) or FileSink.begin(String) as soon as the graph appears (or any source of graph event, any descendant of
      @link 无效 
      Source
      will do).
      指定者:
      writeAll 在接口中 FileSink
      参数:
      graph - The graph to send as events to the file.
      fileName - Name of the file to write.
      抛出:
      IOException - if an I/O error occurs while writing.

    • writeAll

      public void writeAll(Graph graph, OutputStream stream) throws IOException
      从接口复制的说明: FileSink
      Write the current graph state in one big non-interruptible operation. This operation is a "snapshot" of the graph, it will never convey the dynamics of the graph. To ensure you store the graph "as it evolves in time" you must use the FileSink.begin(Writer) or FileSink.begin(OutputStream) or FileSink.begin(String) as soon as the graph appears (or any source of graph event, any descendant of
      @link 无效 
      Source
      will do).
      指定者:
      writeAll 在接口中 FileSink
      参数:
      graph - The graph to send as events to the file.
      stream - The stream where the graph is sent.
      抛出:
      IOException - if an I/O error occurs while writing.

    • writeAll

      public void writeAll(Graph graph, Writer writer) throws IOException
      从接口复制的说明: FileSink
      Write the current graph state in one big non-interruptible operation. This operation is a "snapshot" of the graph, it will never convey the dynamics of the graph. To ensure you store the graph "as it evolves in time" you must use the FileSink.begin(Writer) or FileSink.begin(OutputStream) or FileSink.begin(String) as soon as the graph appears (or any source of graph event, any descendant of
      @link 无效 
      Source
      will do).
      指定者:
      writeAll 在接口中 FileSink
      参数:
      graph - The graph to send as events to the file.
      writer - The writer where the graph is sent.
      抛出:
      IOException - if an I/O error occurs while writing.

    • begin

      public void begin(String fileName) throws IOException
      从接口复制的说明: FileSink
      Begin the output of the given stream of graph events. The graph events can come from any input (implementation of
      @link 无效 
      Source
      or you can directly use the methods inherited from Sink. Once the writing is started using begin(), you must close it using FileSink.end() when done to ensure data is correctly stored in the file.
      指定者:
      begin 在接口中 FileSink
      参数:
      fileName - The name of the file where to output the graph events.
      抛出:
      IOException - If an I/O error occurs while writing.

    • begin

      public void begin(OutputStream stream) throws IOException
      从接口复制的说明: FileSink
      Begin the output of the given stream of graph events. The graph events can come from any input (implementation of
      @link 无效 
      Source
      or you can directly use the methods inherited from Sink. Once the writing is started using begin(), you must close it using FileSink.end() when done to ensure data is correctly stored in the file.
      指定者:
      begin 在接口中 FileSink
      参数:
      stream - The file stream where to output the graph events.
      抛出:
      IOException - If an I/O error occurs while writing.

    • begin

      public void begin(Writer writer) throws IOException
      从接口复制的说明: FileSink
      Begin the output of the given stream of graph events. The graph events can come from any input (implementation of
      @link 无效 
      Source
      or you can directly use the methods inherited from Sink. Once the writing is started using begin(), you must close it using FileSink.end() when done to ensure data is correctly stored in the file.
      指定者:
      begin 在接口中 FileSink
      参数:
      writer - The writer where to output the graph events.
      抛出:
      IOException - If an I/O error occurs while writing.

    • flush

      public void flush() throws IOException
      从接口复制的说明: FileSink
      Ensure all data sent to the output are correctly written.
      指定者:
      flush 在接口中 FileSink
      抛出:
      IOException - If an I/O error occurs during write.

    • end

      public void end() throws IOException
      从接口复制的说明: FileSink
      End the writing process started with FileSink.begin(OutputStream) or FileSink.begin(String).
      指定者:
      end 在接口中 FileSink
      抛出:
      IOException
